title: sonchus bulbosus subsp. willkomii
intro: Sonchus bulbosus subsp. willkomii, also known as Sonchus willkomii, is a subspecies of the sanguisorba or bloodwort, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. Traditionally, Sonchus bulbosus subsp. willkomii has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and improving respiratory problems. Sonchus bulbosus subsp. willkomii is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
